detail: Read Sprenger et al. 2025 and Petrovic et al. 2025 in full from the provided PDFs (text extracted with pypdfium2).
Rendered the Sprenger MPST binding/kinetics figure region at 300-430 DPI and read the constants off the page glyphs.
evidence: MPST K_D = 3.2 uM; Km = 2.1 uM (95% CI 1.0-3.8 uM)

detail: Rendered Petrovic Fig 2E at 300 DPI and read the CSE kinetic table for ergothioneine vs cysteine.
evidence: CSE Km(ET)=6.6 mM, Km(Cys)=17 mM; kcat/Km 0.117 vs 0.046 mM^-1 s^-1

detail: Cropped individual page tokens to confirm micro-sign glyphs where the text-extraction layer had rendered 'mM'; confirmed the extractor silently drops the micro sign.
evidence: glyph crops: MPST K_D, MPST Km, '500 uM EGT', '27.5 uM MPST' (ITC), '10 uM' dose

detail: Computed the ITC Wiseman c-value from titrated protein concentration and K_D to discriminate uM vs mM independently of any glyph.
evidence: c = 27.5/3.2 = 8.6 (measurable) vs 0.0086 at mM (below the ITC resolvability floor)

detail: Computed fractional Michaelis-Menten velocity of MPST and CSE at resting and ergothioneine-diet muscle EGT concentrations.
evidence: MPST 95%->98.5% Vmax; CSE 0.6%->2.1% Vmax; Km ratio ~3,000x

detail: PubMed novelty query: ergothioneine and sulfide:quinone oxidoreductase.
evidence: 1 hit (PMID 27005325), a fission-yeast stress-gene study = false match; effectively 0

detail: PubMed novelty query: ergothioneine and persulfidation of a calcium/contractile target.
evidence: 0 hits

detail: PubMed and OpenAlex novelty query: ergothioneine + MPST + CSE unified mechanism.
evidence: 0 PubMed, 0 OpenAlex

detail: PubMed novelty query: ergothioneine and NADH shuttle (glycerophosphate / malate-aspartate).
evidence: 0 hits

detail: PRIDE lookup of the proteomics accessions cited by the two papers. The Sprenger paper cites two (its PISA and muscle deposits); one resolves in PRIDE and one does not, so the resolving accession is the one carried into the answer.
evidence: PXD056181 (Sprenger muscle) resolves; PXD043654 (Sprenger PISA, cited in the paper) does not resolve; PXD051587 and PXD051609 (Petrovic) resolve to the correct DOI

detail: Resolved an 11-gene sulfur/shuttle panel to authoritative identifiers via MyGene.
evidence: MPST P25325, CTH P32929, SQOR Q9Y6N5, GPD1 P21695, GPD2 P43304, ETHE1 O95571, TST Q16762, SLC22A4 Q9H015, CBS P35520, PPARGC1A Q9UBK2, PPARA Q07869

detail: GTEx v8 median expression, skeletal muscle vs liver, for the sulfide-handling and shuttle enzymes.
GTEx v8 SQOR expression ranked across 18 tissues to test whether it is muscle-restricted.
evidence: muscle 53 TPM ranks 3rd (whole blood ~87, lung ~63) -> enriched vs liver but not muscle-restricted

detail: STRING interaction network for the sulfide-handling enzymes.
evidence: ETHE1-SQOR 0.993, SQOR-TST 0.952, MPST-SQOR 0.762, CTH-SQOR 0.752, MPST-CTH 0.998

detail: Reactome pathway mapping of the sulfide enzymes.
evidence: SQOR/ETHE1/TST -> R-HSA-1614517 'Sulfide oxidation to sulfate'; MPST/CTH one step upstream

detail: PDB metadata lookup for the structures cited from the two papers.
evidence: 4JGT human MPST 2.16A; 2NMP human CSE 2.6A; 1WPQ GPD1+NAD+DHAP 2.5A

detail: PDB search for experimental human SQOR structures by UniProt accession.
evidence: 8 structures: 6MO6, 6MP5, 6OI5, 6OI6, 6OIB, 6OIC, 6WH6, 8DHK

detail: AlphaFold model coverage for the candidate proteins.
evidence: models present for all; pLDDT 85-96

detail: PubMed for SQOR redox regulation and activation by H2S.
evidence: PMID 40912653 (H2S-dependent activation of human SQOR, JBC 2025); PMID 36758466 (NRF2 & sulfur metabolism, Redox Biol 2023)

detail: PubMed anchors for H2S->SQOR->CoQ bioenergetics and the bell-shaped H2S dose-response.
PubMed for the identity of the ergothioneine transporter.
evidence: PMID 15795384 (transporter discovery); PMID 34958679 (substrate/location inventory)

detail: PRIDE project-protein search on the Petrovic deposits for SQOR and GPD1.
evidence: no protein rows returned by the connector; SQOR presence in the persulfidome could not be confirmed and was left as an open item

detail: ChEMBL lookup for the MPST and CSE tool inhibitors used as controls.
evidence: I3MT-3 and propargylglycine not indexed by those names; cited from primary literature/methods instead of a fabricated id

detail: Two-sample and interaction sample-size computation for the pilot (voluntary-wheel-running CV ~18%, +19% target effect).
evidence: n=16/group for the main effect; n=24/group for the EGT x SQOR interaction (2x2 core = 96 animals)

detail: Built the two-panel summary figure (affinity partition; GTEx muscle vs liver expression).
evidence: figures/affinity_partition_and_expression.png

detail: Re-pulled metadata for every cited PMID to confirm each exists and matches the claim it supports.
evidence: all core PMIDs confirmed with correct titles/journals/years
